Compliance.description: NCA, CPA and NCA registration assumed; 2024 ad compliance issues; finance disclosed. Dealership codes suggest compliance but no NCA number visible.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Google 3.9/5 (160 reviews). HelloPeter 2.2/5 (9 reviews, 67% negative). Mixed sales vs after-sales.

Product Value.description: Broad used/new stock at competitive prices; Baic/Haval new. Finance options available.

Innovation.description: Website stock search, WhatsApp sales, 360 car views, online finance application.

Customer Support.description: WhatsApp/phone; site contact form; multiple branches. Mixed: positive sales reviews but service complaints.

Accessibility & Security.description: Online stock with finance calculator; SA data practices assumed standard; POPIA compliance not explicitly stated.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Used from ~R100K; new from R250K+. Finance available.

socialSentiment.summary: Google reviews mixed (3.9/5). HelloPeter low (2.2/5). Positive sales experience but service issues.

Compliance.description: NCA registered dealer group, CPA compliance, finance through Wesbank/Standard Bank. No recent violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Google Maps avg 4.0/5 (500+ reviews per branch). HelloPeter 3.0/5 (mixed). Positive on new car process.

Product Value.description: Broad new/used Toyota, Ford, Honda, BMW inventory. Trade-ins, full finance, service plans. Market-rate pricing.

Innovation.description: Online stock search, finance calculator, dealer chat, click-and-collect. Digital tools adequate.

Customer Support.description: Multiple dealerships (100+), call centre, service workshops. Service dept issues on HelloPeter.

Accessibility & Security.description: Online tools, finance applications, POPIA-compliant contact forms; no direct violations found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Market rate. Finance from R1500/mo+. Trade-in valuation.

socialSentiment.summary: Google maps generally positive per branch; HelloPeter mixed nationally. Service concerns common.

Compliance.description: NCA registered, CPA compliant, finance via registered institutions. Listed entity (Transaction Capital). No recent violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Trustpilot 4.6/5 (7500+ reviews, rare SA achievement). Google 4.4/5. HelloPeter 3.7/5. Widely praised.

Product Value.description: Largest used car platform, 50K+ stock. Competitive pricing with online transparency. Warranty options.

Innovation.description: Fully digital: online car valuations, instant offers, online purchase/finance, 140+ collection points, mobile app.

Customer Support.description: Live chat, call centre, 140+ locations. Praised on Trustpilot. Occasional complaints on post-purchase issues.

Accessibility & Security.description: App available, POPIA compliant, secure transactions, nationwide presence, digital-first.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Market rate used vehicles. Finance options. No hidden fees claimed.

socialSentiment.summary: Excellent on Trustpilot; highest rated used car dealer in SA. Minor post-purchase complaints.

Compliance.description: NCA/CPA compliant as marketplace; POPIA privacy policy in place; 2025 consumer data policy compliant. No violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Google Maps 4.2/5 (1K reviews on ad; app 4.2/5). Trustpilot limited but positive for platform. Most used SA car marketplace.

Product Value.description: Free listing for private; dealer fees. Comprehensive tools: valuations, finance, insurance compare. Most stock in SA.

Innovation.description: Price check, smart alerts, finance/insurance integration, new car spec builder, 360/video listings. Mobile app.

Customer Support.description: Online help centre, contact form, dealer support. Consumer focused platform support adequate.

Accessibility & Security.description: App 4.2/5 Android (500K reviews), POPIA compliant, secure SSL. Digital-first marketplace.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free for private sellers. Dealer packages from R599/mo.

socialSentiment.summary: Most trusted SA car marketplace. App highly rated. Minor complaints on fraud/scam listings.

Compliance.description: POPIA policy in place. NCA/CPA assumed compliant as marketplace/dealer. No specific violations found but lesser compliance info vs AutoTrader.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Google Play 4.2/5 (23K reviews). App Store 4.7/5 (7K reviews). Positive for app but less overall brand data.

Product Value.description: Large inventory (used/new). Finance calculator. Warranty options. Lower profile but good value platform.

Innovation.description: Mobile app, online listings, finance calculator. Less innovation than AutoTrader.

Customer Support.description: Website contact, email support. Limited publicly visible complaints or praise. Adequate but not outstanding.

Accessibility & Security.description: Mobile app available, POPIA in place, secure site. Standard for marketplace.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free private listings. Dealer listings from R299/mo.

socialSentiment.summary: App reviews positive; limited brand-level social data. Generally positive but less visible.
